3144500.name: Princess Trouble
3144500.description:
In Princess Trouble, immerse yourself in a captivating platformer adventure where you must navigate a mystical castle to find a way back to the living world. After the princess falls from a tower and lands in a supernatural realm resembling her home castle—only now filled with traps and mysteries—her only escape lies through intricate puzzles and challenging obstacles. Utilize unique movement mechanics and keys to uncover secrets and overcome barriers on each level.

Game Features:

Innovative Movement Mechanics: Construct flight paths and find the right directions to solve complex puzzles.
Engaging Platformer: Explore a mystical castle brimming with secrets and traps.
Challenging Puzzles: Tackle unique tasks on each level to advance forward.
